descriptions.description: File contains meta data for the JCAMP files. Meta data can be mapped to their respective jcamp files with field "identifier". Following meta data are listed in the file : 1. sample_id : sample id from the chemotion repository. 2. kind : kind of IR spectrum. 3. analysis_id : analysis id from the chemotion repository , 4. cano_smiles: canonical SMILES code for the sample. 5. authors: author id, name, orcid id, given name, family name, affiliations id of the author who published the data in chemotion repository. 6. affiliations: afflliations of the author. 7. content: interpretation of the measurement file given in text form, 8. datasets: file name and identifier of the jcamp file. 9. instrument: instrument used to measure IR spectrum
